summary: Recurring schedules work across all months, per-occurrence completion, accurate dates, and a smarter Focus Hub.

notes: Fixed Add Schedule saving the wrong date — the date you pick is the date that saves (was shifting a day ahead in some timezones)
Recurring schedules now appear correctly every week and in future months (July, August and beyond), across Daily, Weekly, Monthly, and Yearly views
Per-occurrence completion: completing one day of a repeating task no longer marks the whole series done
Focus Hub: overdue items are flagged separately with Reschedule, Mark Completed, Mark Missed, and Clear — the AI no longer suggests time slots for tasks whose time has passed
Smart Reschedule now shows the full date and time (not just the time) so cross-day moves are clear
AI Priorities: added a This Month focus summary (busy days, free days, overload risks)
Theme polish: charts, score rings, and progress bars now follow the selected theme
Unified System Settings: Account, Notifications, Customize Dashboard, and Software Update in one grouped card
AI assistant tone rewritten — supportive planning partner, never judgmental
Calendar yearly view: readable mini-grids with day-of-week headers and circular today highlight
Streak algorithm fix: no longer resets to zero at start of day
Dashboard metrics clarified: Today count and Load score now clearly labeled
Software Update section: real version detection, cache-clearing update flow
Fixed theme-aware colors in Progress Details and Active Session sheets
Replaced hardcoded dark-only colors with adaptive CSS variables
Added Missed/Skip option to task completion prompt
Time-safe rescheduling — past time slots are now disabled
Removed hardcoded demo data — all stats now use real user data
Simplified swipe-to-delete: single tap, immediate action with undo
Built Active Session sheet with live countdown timer
Added real-time progress bar across all schedule views
Notification scheduler with browser push support
Workload balance sheet with interactive filters
